title: rhododendron cinnabarinum subsp. cinnabarinum
intro: Rhododendron cinnabarinum subsp. cinnabarinum, also known as the Chinese rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the mountainous regions of southern China and northern India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron cinnabarinum subsp. cinnabarinum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
